title: Check Your Inventory
description: Learn how to use /inventory to buy, review, and sell items with dUSD.

dialogue.text: Time to learn the inventory loop. Open /inventory, search for "9 V battery," check its price, and buy one with dUSD.

Great. /inventory is your market + backpack in one place: buy priced items with dUSD, and sell eligible items back for dUSD. Open any tradeable item to preview Sell value, then confirm a sale if you want to test it. Item counts update immediately after each buy/sell, and quest requirements read from those counts—so keep at least one 9 V battery for this objective.
Perfect. You now know how to navigate /inventory, buy what you need, and manage counts so quests complete smoothly.
